name: Kilik Rung
description: A popular EAT-Class Meister partnered with twin weapons, Fire and Thunder. He is considered one of the top three student fighters in the DWMA, and is good friends with [Ox](https://anilist.co/character/14062/Ox-Ford) and [Kim](https://anilist.co/character/14063/Kim-Diehl). Rather hot blooded and direct, with a fiery soul and enough compassion to put his own life on the line for his friends.
